name: college-advisor-agent
description: 美国大学选择咨询 Agent Web 应用 - 基于 CodeBuddy Agent SDK

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: cd client && npm run build && cd server && npm run build
scripts.clean: rm -rf client/dist server/dist node_modules server/node_modules client/node_modules
